message:
feat(frankenpandas): expose timedelta + tz options surface (fd90.218 / br-w2g5c)

Seven fp-frame items were entirely hidden from the frankenpandas
crate — not reachable via either prelude OR top-level path:

Types:
- ToTimedeltaOptions (unit, errors)
- ToTimedeltaErrors (enum)
- TzLocalizeOptions (ambiguous, nonexistent)
- TzAmbiguousPolicy (Raise/...)
- TzNonexistentPolicy (Raise/...)

Functions:
- to_timedelta_with_options
- to_timedelta_with_unit

The README documents to_timedelta extensively (lines 596-605) and
tz_localize at line 594. The basic forms work, but configuration
through the options structs was unreachable.

Fix:
- Add to top-level fp_frame re-exports
- Add to prelude module
- Extend prelude_completeness_compile_guard

Verified: 35 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -857,6 +857,7 @@

 {"id":"frankenpandas-vzqy","title":"fp-columnar Column.slice (range view) parity","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T06:29:34.318950950Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T06:33:59.504305433Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T06:33:59.502114424Z","close_reason":"Implemented Column::slice in commit 593b679, 3 tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-vzw6","title":"fd90.63: fp-index needs crate-level rustdoc for index/multiindex/alignment","description":"Continuation of fd90.61/62 doc audit. Add crate-level //! rustdoc to fp-index - the row-label / index machinery used by every fp-frame DataFrame and Series. Public surface: Index (the canonical row-label container), IndexLabel (typed label enum), IndexError, MultiIndex (hierarchical multi-level index), MultiIndexOrIndex (sum type), AlignMode / AlignmentPlan / MultiAlignmentPlan (binary-op alignment between two indexes). Doc explains the role (row-label storage), label types, alignment semantics matching pandas Index.union/intersection/etc., and the relationship to fp-frame/fp-types. Pure docs. Verify cargo doc cleanly.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"docs","assignee":"cc-pandas-2","created_at":"2026-04-26T05:49:28.280919200Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-26T05:52:01.633441076Z","closed_at":"2026-04-26T05:52:01.631019761Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["docs","fd90","review"]}
+{"id":"frankenpandas-w2g5c","title":"fd90.218: Expose ToTimedeltaOptions/TzLocalizeOptions + variants to prelude","description":"fd90.218: Expose timedelta + tz options surface (5 types + 2 functions) to top-level + prelude.

These items are entirely hidden from frankenpandas (not reachable via top-level OR prelude):

Types:
- ToTimedeltaOptions (pub fields: unit, errors) — pairs with to_timedelta_with_options
- ToTimedeltaErrors (enum)
- TzLocalizeOptions (pub fields: ambiguous, nonexistent)
- TzAmbiguousPolicy (enum: Raise/...)
- TzNonexistentPolicy (enum: Raise/...)

Functions:
- to_timedelta_with_options
- to_timedelta_with_unit (convenience over with_options)

The README mentions to_timedelta extensively in the "Datetime Parsing and Accessors" section (lines 596-605) and tz_localize at line 594. The basic to_timedelta and tz_localize methods are usable, but configuration via the options structs is unreachable.

Scope:
- Add the 5 types + 2 fns to the top-level fp_frame re-exports
- Add to prelude
- Extend prelude_completeness_compile_guard

Files: crates/frankenpandas/src/lib.rs.

All seven existed in fp_frame but were entirely hidden from frankenpandas (not reachable via prelude OR top-level path). Extended prelude_completeness_compile_guard with type-checks.  {"id":"frankenpandas-w3ji","title":"fp-columnar Column.take (integer gather) parity","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T06:29:34.150619825Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T06:33:59.324824396Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T06:33:59.322880385Z","close_reason":"Implemented Column::take in commit 593b679, 2 tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-w43q","title":"fd90.21: SqlConnection::table_schema for backend-agnostic column introspection","description":"Add SqlConnection::table_schema(table, schema) -> Result<Option<SqlTableSchema>, IoError> trait method for backend-agnostic column metadata introspection. Default impl returns Ok(None) (backends that can't introspect). rusqlite override uses PRAGMA table_info(table) and maps cid/name/type/notnull/dflt_value/pk to SqlColumnSchema. Schema arg silently ignored on SQLite. Free-fn sql_table_schema(conn, table, schema) wrapper exposes the API. Tests cover unknown table -> None, simple table, table with PK + nullable + default, and multi-schema backend stub.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"cc-pandas-2","created_at":"2026-04-25T20:25:26.392204953Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T20:29:33.592867620Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T20:29:33.590297206Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fd90","review","sql"]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-w4uu","title":"[MEDIUM] parity: MultiIndex .loc multi-axis slicing semantics","description":"Parity-gap audit: MultiIndex `.loc` multi-axis slicing.

**Scope.** pandas `df.loc[(level_0_key, level_1_key), columns]` indexes a row-MultiIndex DataFrame with a tuple. Supports:
- Exact tuple match: `df.loc[('A', 1)]` → Series.
- Partial tuple: `df.loc['A']` → sub-DataFrame (only outer-level filter).
- Slice in tuple: `df.loc[(slice(None), 1)]` → cross-section on inner level.
- pd.IndexSlice builder: `df.loc[pd.IndexSlice[:, 1], :]`.
- Slicing: `df.loc['A':'B', :]` requires sorted MultiIndex; raises `KeyError` otherwise.

**FrankenPandas state.** fp-index exposes `MultiIndex` struct and `DataFrame::xs` / `xs_level`. Check:

```
grep -n "pub fn loc\b\|loc_multi\|xs\|IndexSlice" crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs
grep -n "pub fn " crates/fp-index/src/lib.rs | head -20
```

DISC-006 documents scaffolded row-MultiIndex status. This bead is the concrete audit of `.loc` tuple semantics.

**Severity.** MEDIUM — MultiIndex is claimed in the README capability table but .loc edge cases are not proven at parity.

**Fix shape.**
1. Live-oracle tests in crates/fp-conformance/src/tests/conformance_multiindex_loc.rs covering 10 inputs: exact tuple match, partial tuple (outer), partial tuple (inner via slice), sorted-range slice, unsorted-range slice (expect error), pd.IndexSlice form, missing key KeyError, duplicate MultiIndex labels, NaN level values, empty frame.
2. Any divergence → child [HIGH] bead per failure case.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"cc-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T02:11:52.107787752Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T03:30:55.891849103Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T03:30:55.889372396Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["loc","multiindex","parity-gap","review"]}
